mmc1: S1A - Patient, sample and data characteristics
S1B - WES, nsSNV & neoepitope calls
Patient ID | Patient identifier in this study
BRCA2mutant? | Flag to indicate if BRCA2 has SNV/INDEL in this tumor

Response | Patients with irRECIST of "complete response", "partial response" and "stable disease" are categorized as "Responders" (R); 
those with "progressive disease" as "Non-responders" (NR)
Purity | Tumor purity as estimated by Sequenza
Ploidy | Tumor ploidy as estimated by Sequenza
AvgCovTumor | Mean WES coverage
PctCov15Tumor | Percent of targeted exome region with coverage of 15 reads or more
AvgCovNormal | Mean WES coverage in the normal samples
PctCov15Normal | Percent of targeted exome region with coverage of 15 reads or more in the normal samples
TotalNonSyn | Total number of somatic non-synonymous single nucleotide variations (nsSNVs)
Binder | Total nsSNVs with at least one patient matched HLA class 1 neoepitope (netHMCpan 2.8 score cutoff: rank percentage ≤ 2% and predicted affinity ≤ 500nM)

Binder_WT_NonBinder | Total nsSNVs with at least one patient-matched HLA class 1 neoepitope (netHMCpan 2.8 score cutoff: rank percentage ≤ 2% and predicted affinity ≤ 500nM) where the wild type peptide is predicted to be not binding (netHMCpan 2.8 score cutoff: rank percentage > 2% or predicted affinity > 500nM)
StrongBinder | Total nsSNVs with at least one patient matched HLA class 1 strong neoepitope (netHMCpan 2.8 score cutoff: rank percentage ≤ 0.5% and predicted affinity ≤ 50nM)

StrongBinder_WT_NonStrongBinder | Total nsSNVs with at least one patient matched HLA class 1 strong neoepitope (netHMCpan 2.8 score cutoff: rank percentage ≤ 0.5% and predicted affinity ≤ 50nM) where the wild type peptide is predicted to be not a strong binder (netHMCpan 2.8 score cutoff: rank percentage > 0.5% or predicted affinity > 50nM)

StrongBinder_WT_NonBinder | Total nsSNVs with at least one patient matched HLA class 1 strong neoepitope (netHMCpan 2.8 score cutoff: rank percentage ≤ 0.5% and predicted affinity ≤ 50nM) where the wild type peptide is predicted to be not binding (netHMCpan 2.8 score cutoff: rank percentage > 2% or predicted affinity > 500nM)
TotalNonSyn_Exp | Total somatic nsSNVs on genes with normalized expression (FPKM) ≥ 1
Binder_Exp | Same as "Binder" but only on expressed nsSNVs
Binder_WT_NonBinder_Exp | Same as "Binder_WT_NonBinder" but only on expressed nsSNVs
StrongBinder_Exp | Same as "StrongBinder" but only on expressed nsSNVs
StrongBinder_WT_NonStrongBinder_Exp | Same as "StrongBinder_WT_NonStrongBinder" but only on expressed nsSNVs
StrongBinder_WT_NonBinder_Exp | Same as "StrongBinder_WT_NonBinder" but only on expressed nsSNVs
Binder_2 | Total nsSNVs with at least one patient matched HLA class 2 neoepitope (netHMCIIpan 3.0 score cutoff: rank percentage ≤ 2% and predicted affinity ≤ 500nM)

Binder_WT_NonBinder_2 | Total nsSNVs with at least one patient-matched HLA class 2 neoepitope (netHMCIIpan 3.0 score cutoff: rank percentage ≤ 2% and predicted affinity ≤ 500nM) where the wild type peptide is predicted to be not binding (netHMCIIpan 3.0 score cutoff: rank percentage > 2% or predicted affinity > 500nM)
StrongBinder_2 | Total nsSNVs with at least one patient matched HLA class 2 strong neoepitope (netHMCIIpan 3.0 score cutoff: rank percentage ≤ 0.5% and predicted affinity ≤ 50nM)

StrongBinder_WT_NonStrongBinder_2 | Total nsSNVs with at least one patient matched HLA class 2 strong neoepitope (netHMCIIpan 3.0 score cutoff: rank percentage ≤ 0.5% and predicted affinity ≤ 50nM) where the wild type peptide is predicted to be not a strong binder (netHMCIIpan 3.0 score cutoff: rank percentage > 0.5% or predicted affinity > 50nM)

StrongBinder_WT_NonBinder_2 | Total nsSNVs with at least one patient matched HLA class 2 strong neoepitope (netHMCIIpan 3.0 score cutoff: rank percentage ≤ 0.5% and predicted affinity ≤ 50nM) where the wild type peptide is predicted to be not binding (netHMCIIpan 3.0 score cutoff: rank percentage > 2% or predicted affinity > 500nM)
Binder_Exp_2 | Same as "Binder_2" but only on expressed nsSNVs
Binder_WT_NonBinder_Exp_2 | Same as "Binder_WT_NonBinder_2" but only on expressed nsSNVs
StrongBinder_Exp_2 | Same as "StrongBinder_2" but only on expressed nsSNVs
StrongBinder_WT_NonStrongBinder_Exp_2 | Same as "StrongBinder_WT_NonStrongBinder_2" but only on expressed nsSNVs
StrongBinder_WT_NonBinder_Exp_2 | Same as "StrongBinder_WT_NonBinder_2" but only on expressed nsSNVs
Total mutation | Total number of somatic single nucleotide variations (SNVs, including silent and non-coding)
A>G | Total number of A>G or T>C transition
C>T | Total number of G>A or C>T transition
A>C | Total number of T>G or A>C transversion
A>T | Total number of A>T or T>A transversion
C>A | Total number of G>T or C>A transversion
C>G | Total number of C>G or G>C transversion
A>G.frac | Total fraction of A>G or T>C transition
C>T.frac | Total fraction of G>A or C>T transition
A>C.frac | Total fraction of T>G or A>C transversion
A>T.frac | Total fraction of A>T or T>A transversion
C>A.frac | Total fraction of G>T or C>A transversion
C>G.frac | Total fraction of C>G or G>C transversion
S1C - Validated neoepitope table
Peptide sequence | The peptide sequence of the validated neoepitope
HLA type | The HLA context on which the neoepitope was validated
Gene | The gene on which the neoepitope was found
AA mut | The missense mutation that generated the neoepitope
mutPos | The position of the amino acid mutation on the peptide sequence
Ref | The reference publication
S1D - Mutation List Table
Chr | Chromosome on which the mutation occur
Pos | Position of the mutation
NucMut | Nucleotide mutation type
Sample | Patient identifier
Gene | Gene affected by the mutation
Transcript | Transcript(s) affected by the mutation
Detail | Details of the gene/transcript
MutType | Mutation type
Aamut | Amino acid change
CodonChange | Codon change
cDNAmut | Position of mutation in the mRNA of the transcript
ConsvScr | Conservation scores from mutliple databases (SIFT, PolyPhen, etc)
Database | Database record(s) of this mutation (dbSNP, COSMIC, etc)
NumCall | Number of program(s) calling this mutation
MUTECT | Mutation call by MUTECT
HapCaller | Mutation call by Haplotype Caller
VarScan2 | Mutation call by VarScan2
S1E - Mutation Recurrence Table
Gene | Recurrently mutated gene (occur in at least 25% of the responder/non-responder with at most 1 occurrence in the opposite group
RatioRtoNR | The ratio between the frequency of the gene mutation in the responder vs. non-responder group
NumHitsR | Number of responder with mutation on this gene
PvalR | Fisher exact test P-value of the recurrence in the responder given the background prevalence of the gene mutation
PvalRadj | FDR adjust p-value of PvalR
LorR | The odds ratio of the recurrence observed in the responder
NumHitsNR | Number of non-responder with mutation on this gene
PvalNR | Fisher exact test P-value of the recurrence in the non-responder given the background prevalence of the gene mutation
PvalNRadj | FDR adjust p-value of PvalNR
LorNR | The odds ratio of the recurrence observed in the non-responder
BGhit | The number of times this gene is mutated in the bacground datasets (Hodis et al and TCGA Melanoma, n=469)
mmc2: S2A-Differentially expressed genes in responding vs non-responding tumors
Gene | Gene name
Pval | The Mann Whitney p-value of the expression difference in the responders (R) vs. non-responders (NR)
FDR | FDR corrected p-value of theMann-Whitney test
Stats | The U statistics
diffAvg | Difference in the median expression in the responders substracted by those of the non responders
avg.R | Median expression in Responders (R)
avg.NR | Median expression in Non-responders (NR)
S2B-Differentially enriched genesets in responding vs non-responding tumors
Geneset | Geneset name (only including genesets of size 25 and above)
Pval | The Welch T-test p-value of the GSVA enrichment score difference between the responders (R) vs. non-responders (NR)
FDR | FDR corrected p-value of the T-test
Stats | The T statistics
diffAvg | Difference in the median enrichment scores in the responders substracted by those of the non responders
avg.R | Median GSVA enrichment score in Responders (R)
avg.NR | Median GSVA enrichment score in Non-responders (NR)
S2C-MAPKi induced signature and others
Geneset | Geneset name (only those not included in the Molecular Signature Database)
Detail | The details/source on the gene signatures
Gene Listing | The list of the genes in the signature
